variables.name: DB_HOST
variables.description: Local Docker PostgreSQL (host network from run-hop.sh)

variables.name: DB_PORT
variables.description: PostgreSQL port (non-default to avoid collision with host PostgreSQL on 5432)

variables.name: DB_SOURCE_NAME
variables.description: PostgreSQL database for CRM source landing tables

variables.name: DB_TARGET_NAME
variables.description: PostgreSQL database for Data Vault / Business Vault / dimensional targets
